S.FORM: Tyrees Allen kawas tay 1954, ryax sa tay 31 nqu tay 7, Tyrees Allen, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: tjrees~ɕ allen kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, tjrees~ɕ allen, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ

S.PHON: tjrees~ɕ allen kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, tjrees~ɕ allen, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
